backend/main.mo: IC actor storing admission submissions in a map with timestamp and an admin‑protected query to list them.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping feature IDs to affected files, components, test IDs, and confidence levels.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Text file containing prewritten one‑sentence summaries for numerous frontend files.
frontend/index.css: Base Tailwind setup defining CSS variables for light/dark themes using HSL values and applying global bg/text styles.
frontend/index.html: Root HTML document with a single mount div and script entry for the React app.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Configures TanStack Router routes for all pages and wraps the app in gender and class selection providers.
frontend/src/components/admissions/Admis: React form component using react‑hook‑form to submit admission enquiries via backend mutation with validation and UI elements.
frontend/src/components/learning/Alphabe: Scrollable grid picker for selecting alphabet letters or digits using styled buttons.
frontend/src/components/learning/ClassSe: Dropdown selector wired to ClassSelectionContext for choosing the user's class.
frontend/src/components/learning/Tracing: Canvas component enabling guided character tracing with strokes, undo, clear, and adjustable stroke width.
frontend/src/components/math/MathSection: Renders tabbed math sections with problem cards, showing a fallback message when no sections exist.
frontend/src/components/math/PracticeCar: Interactive math problem card allowing users to enter, check, and reveal answers with feedback.
Displays GK questions in an accordion with numbered items and revealed answers.
frontend/src/components/rhymes/RhymeCard: Shows rhyme info with an icon and a button to trigger playback.
frontend/src/components/rhymes/RhymePlay: Modal player for rhymes offering audio/video tabs or lyrics when media is unavailable.
frontend/src/components/site/AnimatedSec: Wrapper that animates children into view using intersection observer and selectable effects.
frontend/src/components/site/BrandLogo.t: Displays the school logo with hover animation and tagline.
frontend/src/components/site/Footer.tsx: Footer with copyright, attribution link, and school description.
frontend/src/components/site/GenderSelec: Toggle buttons to switch the UI theme between girl and boy modes.
frontend/src/components/site/HeaderNav.t: Responsive site header with navigation links, gender selector, and mobile drawer menu.
Page layout wrapping content with header and footer.
frontend/src/components/site/SubjectIcon: Renders subject-specific icons from a sprite sheet based on coordinates.
frontend/src/components/social/TopicCard: Card showing a social studies topic with icon, title, description, and optional content.
frontend/src/content/contact.ts: Exports contact information including address, email, phone, and social links.
frontend/src/content/gk.ts: Defines GK question types and provides class-level question banks.
frontend/src/content/math.ts: Defines math problem and section interfaces and provides structured math exercises by class level.
frontend/src/content/rhymes.ts: Defines a rhyme interface and exports a list of nursery rhymes with descriptions and lyrics.
frontend/src/content/socialStudies.ts: Declares social studies topic and question types and supplies per-class content with topics and Q&A.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React hook that creates and manages a backend actor based on Internet Identity and refreshes dependent queries.
frontend/src/hooks/useCreateAdmissionSub: Provides a mutation hook to submit admission form data through the backend actor and invalidate related queries.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Implements Internet Identity context, handling login, stored identity restoration, and exposing identity state.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind-based global styles defining themes, including light, dark, and gender-specific color variables.
frontend/src/learning/classLevels.ts: Defines class level types, options, and helper functions for labels and display names.
frontend/src/learning/ClassSelectionCont: Provides a React context for managing the selected class level with sessionStorage persistence.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Bootstraps the React app with React Query and Internet Identity providers.
frontend/src/pages/AdmissionsPage.tsx: Renders the admissions form and a confirmation screen after submission.
frontend/src/pages/AlphabetNumbersPage.t: Provides an interface to select letters or numbers and practice tracing them on a canvas.
frontend/src/pages/ContactPage.tsx: Displays contact information including address, email, phone, and social links.
Shows general knowledge questions filtered by the selected class level.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: Displays the homepage with hero content and links to learning modules.
frontend/src/pages/LearnPage.tsx: Renders the main learning hub with class selection and cards linking to different learning modules. Uses animations and displays the selected class level.
frontend/src/pages/MathematicsPage.tsx: Displays math practice sections filtered by selected class level with tabs for different topics. Includes class selector and animated page elements.
frontend/src/pages/RhymesPage.tsx: Shows a grid of rhyme cards and allows selecting a rhyme to view and play via a RhymePlayer. Uses animated sections for card entry.
frontend/src/pages/SocialStudiesPage.tsx: Loads social studies topics and Q&A based on selected class and displays them with animated sections. Includes a class selector and topic/question components.
frontend/src/theme/GenderThemeContext.ts: Provides a context for managing and persisting a gender-based theme, applying it to the document root. Handles initialization and theme updates via localStorage.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading, persisting, and clearing URL parameters and session-stored values. Supports both normal and hash-based routing.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration with extended colors, animations, fonts, and container settings. Adds playful animation keyframes and custom theme variables.
project_state.json: Metadata describing project goals, features, issues, and current state for the educational website. Tracks requirements, known bugs, and architectural notes.
